questions.question: Which programme aims to ensure access to safe and adequate drinking water through tap connections by 2024?
What is the name of the programme that supports AI-based learning in government schools?
Which policy initiative aims to digitise all Primary Agricultural Credit Societies (PACS)?

In which of the following years was the Pradhan Mantri Gram Sadak Yojana (PMGSY) launched by the Government of India to provide connectivity to unconnected habitations as part of a poverty reduction strategy?
Which state is leading with the highest number of solar power installations under PM Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana (PMSGMBY) by March 2025?
Rural infrastructure development is crucial to improve connectivity and access to markets and services. Which scheme focuses on providing all-weather road connectivity to unconnected habitations?
questions.option_3: Deendayal Antyodaya Yojana - National Rural Livelihoods Mission

questions.question: The 'Special Food Grain Production Programme (SFPP) on Pulses' was implemented during the year ______.
Who initiated the Sampoorna Grameen Rozgar Yojana (SGRY)?
Which scheme has been launched by the Chief Minister of Kerala in May 2025 to educate migrant children?
What is the primary aim of the ‘Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana’?
questions.option_1: Providing mobile phones to rural households

questions.question: In which of the following years was the National Seeds Policy launched?
Which government initiative primarily focuses on improving human development by ensuring healthcare and nutrition for women and children?

Which of the following programs was launched in 2019 by Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change (MoEF&CC) to improve air quality in 131 cities (Non-attainment Cities and Million Plus Cities) in 24 States/UTs?
questions.option_1: National Association of Clean Air Agencies

questions.question: What does UDAY stand for in the context of power distribution companies?
What is the primary goal of the Indian government's Bhashini project?
questions.option_1: To develop a new programming language for Indian developers
questions.option_3: To create a multilingual AI platform for real-time translation among Indian languages
questions.option_4: To establish a national database of dialects

questions.question: Which version of the skill development scheme, launched by the government and implemented from FY 2022 to 2026, aims to provide free training to rural youth in India?
questions.option_3: Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Grameen Kaushalya Yojana 2.0

questions.question: Which of the following schemes aims to empower adolescent girls?
What was the main aim of TRYSEM (Training for Rural Youth for Self-Employment)?
questions.option_1: Offering free education in rural areas
questions.option_3: Upgrading skills of rural youth to tackle unemployment

questions.question: What was the main aim of IRDP (Integrated Rural Development Programme) ?
questions.option_1: To provide free food to rural families
questions.option_3: To assist poor rural families in acquiring assets or skills for self-employment

questions.question: Which of the following is the primary objective of the Shyama Prasad Mukherji Rurban Mission (SPMRM)?
questions.option_2: Development of rural clusters with urban-like facilities
questions.option_3: Ensuring 100 days of wage employment in rural areas

questions.question: Which of the following schemes on Compressed Bio Gas (CBG) encourages entrepreneurs to set up CBG plants, produce and supply CBG to Oil Marketing Companies (OMCs) for sale as automotive and industrial fuels?
When was the Rural Landless Employment Guarantee Programme (RLEGP) launched?
In which of the following years did the Union Cabinet, chaired by the Prime Minister Shri Narendra Modi, approve the Revised Rashtriya Gokul Mission (RGM) to boost growth in the livestock sector?
Which platform provides online learning for civil servants under Mission Karmayogi in India?
When was the National Rural Health Mission (NRHM) launched by the Government of India?
